Internal Deal Memo: Project Starfish

To: Dr. Jonathan Lim  
From: Ms. Emily Tan  
Date: 15 October 2023  

Subject: Confidential Acquisition Proposal - Project Starfish

We are pleased to inform you about the proposed acquisition under the codename Project Starfish. The target company, Coral Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 202312345G), has agreed to enter into preliminary discussions. The proposed acquisition amount is SGD 45,000,000. Kindly note that this is subject to due diligence and board approval.

Please direct all communications regarding this matter to Ms. Emily Tan at emily.tan@coralgroup.sg or contact her directly via phone at +65 6123 4567. For verification and compliance purposes, refer to the internal reference number S2345678D.

This memorandum is strictly confidential and should not be shared outside of the designated acquisition team.
